{{Quote|The future of the company hinges on a rich and untapped vein of vertex crystals as pure as they mine it on Kir.|[[Kara Regallium]], about the [[Weald Mining Concern]]|<ref name="SWG:EMC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Exterminate Murderous Creatures}}</ref>}}
'''Kir''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. A mineral found on this planet was used in the production of [[Crystalline vertex/Legends|crystalline vertex]].
